name: egress-approver
description: Host-side approval UI for dev container egress requests brokered by the approver sidecar.

egressApprover.endpoint.description: Base URL of the approver sidecar (host loopback publish).

egressApprover.token.description: Dev-only: pin the approver token (must match APPROVER_TOKEN). Leave empty to retrieve the generated token from the running container via 'docker compose exec'.

egressApprover.containerName.description: Approver container name or ID for token retrieval ('docker exec <name> cat /run/approver/token'). Leave empty to auto-discover via 'docker ps --filter label=com.docker.compose.service=approver' (first match). Set this if multiple dev containers with an approver service are running simultaneously.
